meta_description: Uluhlu olukhanyo nolusisebenzisayo lwePublic Service vacancies ekuAzania, oluyithathwa ngesiqhumane mula kwi-DPSA Public Service Vacancy Circular.
footer_disclaimer_1: Iindawo zomsebenzi ziyapapashwa kwakhona ivela kwi-Department of Public Service and Administration (DPSA) Public Service Vacancy Circular. Oku kungunxulumano olulumangelwaniso, olusebenza kakuhle ngokwawo.
footer_disclaimer_2: Hlala uqho ucele kwiDepartment ecaciswe kwi-advert ngayo, ngumhla wokuvalela ecaciswe.
mt_notice: Oku ngumguqulelo womshini. Inguqulelo yesiNgesi ine-ngcaciso.
listing_description: {total} iindawo zomsebenzi yePublic Service ekuAzania ivela {label}. Sesha kwaye usifinyeze nge-Department, Province, Sector, Umvuzo kunye nomhla wokuvalela.
search_placeholder: Sesha umtitela womsebenzi, idolophu, inamba yesalathiso…
no_js_note: Amafilthi adinga i-JavaScript. Lonke umsebenzi ulubhengezwe; sebenzisa i-find yeebhrawuza yakho (Ctrl/⌘-F).
empty_state: Ayikho iindawo zomsebenzi ezihambelana namafilthi akho.
apply_note: Qoka ngqo kwi-Department, ngumhla wokuvalela, uveze inamba yesalathiso.
dd_tail: . Oku kungunxulumano olulumangelwaniso; i-advert kwi-circular yingcaciso.
about_description: Indlela yokusebenzi yolu xulumano olulumangelwaniso lwee-Public Service vacancies ekuAzania.
about_p1: Ngesiqhumane (ngaphandle kwa-December) i-Department of Public Service and Administration iyapapasha i-Public Service Vacancy Circular: uluhlu olunye olukulungele olubhengeza lonke isikhundla kuyo yonke inkqubo yeRhulumente, kumzantsi nangoku phezulo. Ibandakanya yonke into, kodwa kunzima ukuyisesha, kunye nobuzito ukuyivula kumakhalekhasela okunobangela ukunyamalala okunobambisanisana.
about_p2: Le sayithi iyapapasha kwakhona ezi ndawo zomsebenzi enye. Sifunda i-circular yakamuva, siyayahlula isizikhundla ngasinye, kwaye sibonisa enye ngela nngu-page oyintlanganisela okuyisesha, osisifinyeza kunye nokuyvula ngokukhawuleza. Iiphepha zilula kwaye zisisixhobo esisizalisekile, ngoko ziyavula kumakhonekta amandilini kunye nokusebenzi nxa i-JavaScript yavalwa.
about_p3: Oku kungunxulumano olulumangelwaniso. Asifumani ucezo kunye nesingabusela isiphakamiso. Lonke i-advert ibhengeza i-Department yokuncezo, umhla wokuvalela, kunye nenamba yesalathiso: qoka ngqo kwale Department, ngale ntsuku, uveze le namba. Apho nantsi ibaleke enxulumano endala, i-circular yile ncinciselo.
archive_description: Jinga-jinga iPublic Service Vacancy Circulars ezakudala.
archive_intro: Lonke umqulu wesiqhumane owesinxibe isiqalo sakhulelwe, okusha kuqala. Iinqulo zendala zisixwayisile ukuba zilungile; ziyagcinwa ngesalathiso.
title_404: Ikhasi alikhange lifumaneke · Iindawo zomsebenzi yePublic Service
e404_body: Indawo yomsebenzi inokukuhambela kwi-archive, okanye isilumkela sinokuba sidala. Qalisa kwakhona evela kwi-circular yakamuva.
